summary.finance: Kospi maintains 8% gains following rally on Iran war resolution hopes and strong March exports.
summary.art: BAMA 2026 continues at BEXCO; ongoing exhibitions at SeMA.

market_highlights: Kospi holding 8%+ gains; monitoring profit-taking in semiconductor sector.
March exports soared 48.3% YoY, bolstering investor sentiment.
SemiCab AI logistics stocks showing intraday volatility.
art_highlights: BAMA 2026 continues through April 5 at BEXCO.
Seo-Seoul Museum of Art 'SeMA Performance' remains open to public.
